rules.name: ReadOnly_All_Fields
rules.description: All header fields are readOnly in the management view. Managers review and approve but do not edit requisition data. This is enforced at the tab level, not per-field readOnly logic.

rules.name: ReadOnly_All_Lines
rules.description: All line fields are readOnly in the management view. Managers inspect lines for approval decisions but cannot modify quantities, prices, or products.

rules.name: DocAction_Approve_Reject
rules.description: Document action handler for Complete (approve) and Void (reject) transitions. When a requisition is completed/approved, it becomes eligible for the Create PO process.

rules.name: CreatePO_From_Requisition
rules.description: Process to convert approved requisition lines into Purchase Orders. Groups lines by vendor (C_BPartner_ID on the line), creates one PO per vendor, and links back via M_Requisitionorder_ID. Core management action.

rules.name: Filter_By_DocStatus
rules.description: Tab-level WHERE clause filters to show only requisitions that are in a reviewable state (Completed, Closed, In Progress, Pending Approval). Draft requisitions still being edited by the requester are excluded.

rules.name: MatchedPO_Display
rules.description: Show the Ordered Qty and linked PO reference on each line so managers can see fulfillment status at a glance.
